title: Ethiopian Keto Beef Tibs with Roasted Pepper
description: A keto twist on a classic Ethiopian dish, featuring tender beef and roasted peppers.

ingredients.name: Injera, torn into pieces (used as a garnish)
Keto-friendly spices (such as berbere, salt, and black pepper)

instructions: 1. Heat avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the roasted yellow pepper slices and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
6. Season with keto-friendly spices to taste.
7. Serve the beef mixture over the torn injera pieces and garnish with additional roasted peppers if desired.
